zh.lifeSummary: 當Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn於大約1323年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾特雷德加時，他的父親Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor43歲，母親Angharad verch Morgan34歲。他於1358年與Nest verch Rhys結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn于大约1323年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾特雷德加时，他的父亲Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor43岁，母亲Angharad verch Morgan34岁。他于1358年与Nest verch Rhys结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Ivor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Scandinavian origin, from an Old Norse personal name, Yherr, derived from ýr ‘yew, bow’ + herr ‘army’. In the 1920s and 30s it came to prominence as the name of the songwriter and actor Ivor Novello ( 1893–1951 ).

nameMeanings.name: Hael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn was born about 1323, in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor, was 43 and his mother, Angharad verch Morgan, was 34. He married Nest verch Rhys in 1358. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1361, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn est né environ 1323, à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Angharad verch Morgan, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Nest verch Rhys en 1358. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1361, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn um 1323 in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor 43 und seine Mutter Angharad verch Morgan 34. Er hat 1358 Nest verch Rhys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1361 im Alter von 39 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn è nato il circa 1323 nel Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Angharad verch Morgan, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Nest verch Rhys nel 1358. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1361, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ivor Hael ap Llewelynが約1323年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアトレデガーで生まれた時，父Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manorは43歳，母Angharad verch Morganは34歳であった。1358年にNest verch Rhysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad verch Morgan(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1358년 Nest verch Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Angharad verch Morgan, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Nest verch Rhys em 1358. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1361, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn родился около 1323 г. в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad verch Morgan, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Nest verch Rhys в 1358 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1361 г. в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ivor Hael ap Llewelyn nació aproximadamente 1323, en Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Angharad verch Morgan, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Nest verch Rhys en 1358. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1361, a la edad de 39 años.
